title: The first Private Round Pool opens on Cryptool
content_html:
The first Private Round Pool is live in the Raise section.

It gives platform users access to an exclusive early-stage opportunity, with the underlying mechanics handled end to end on Cryptool. The pool is open to every account; no gated access list.

Three things worth knowing before you join:

  • Slots are limited and fill on a first-come basis
  • The referral programme is fully active, so anyone who brings their community in earns revenue share on every deposit
  • Positions appear inside the Cryptool dApp from the moment you contribute, with full tracking through to distribution
author: Cryptool
